titles.title: We Know Where the Spirit of the Lord Is

authors.author: Christy Nockels
Christy Nockels
Wo die Gegenwart des Herrn ist

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v1 v6 v7 v5 v1 v6 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We know where the Spirit of the Lord is Where the Spirit of the Lord is There is liberty We know living in your freedom Living in your freedom, see your glory We know where the Spirit of the Lord is Where the Spirit of the Lord is There is liberty

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We're yours, yours is the kingdom We're yours, yours is the kingdom

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the fire through the night You are the flame that burns inside We need your presence more than anything

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: More than just a song to sing More than words or offerings We need your presence more than anything

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You're all that we want You're all that we need You're all that we want You're all that we need

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We're yours, yours is the kingdom We're yours, yours is the kingdom Yours is the kingdom

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Call us closer to your heart Lead us Lord to where you are We need your presence more than anything
